{{Quote|No daughter of mine is going to attend the Academy. It's no place for women.|Reise Durasha|<ref name="ACPOV" />}}
'''Reise Durasha''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Lankashiir]] who served as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was also the father of [[Jak Durasha|Jak]] and [[Bern Durasha]] and the twins [[Celia Durasha|Celia]] and [[Raine Durasha]].

==Biography==
Durasha was like many [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] in the belief that women served no place in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] or Navy. As such, when his daughter Celia was attending [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]], he disallowed her from service. He would later inform her of Raine's death.

Like his sons, he was a graduate of Raithal Academy and often stopped by for guest lectures.
